# Include file sets variables used in rules
mk -n -p 1 -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# Variable deps is set in include.
<./deps

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess ab

one:
	process bar

two:
	process rebar
-- deps --
deps = one two
extracmdarg = gopher
-- expected --
one: process bar
two: process rebar
test3.mk.o: secondprocess ab
